content: Phase 1: Create .env.local with BUYO/CF/GH secrets (gitignored, never logged)
Phase 1: Create test_core.py covering BUYO flows, phone, hashing, _fbc, event_id, CAPI validation
Phase 1: Run test_core.py and fix until all assertions pass (Flow ID confirmed: zra4weGe02NE for offer Otpugivatel Nasekomih)
Phase 1: All POC user stories covered
Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design_agent
Phase 2: Generate product images via vision_expert_agent
Phase 2: Build static landing /app/public/index.html (10 sections, Uzbek Latin, mobile-first)
Phase 2: Build Pages Functions (/app/functions/api/lead.js, config.js, track.js) + _shared modules
Phase 2: Build D1 schema + audit logic (no raw PII)
Phase 2: Configure Emergent preview mirror (Express static + FastAPI mirror)
Phase 2: All user stories covered (US-P2-1 through US-P2-14)
Phase 3: Create GitHub repo + push via API
Phase 3: Create Cloudflare Pages project + D1 binding + deploy via API
Phase 3: Document env vars (names only) + rollback procedure
Phase 4: Mobile QA + Lighthouse + creative pack (8 ads, Uzbek Latin)
Phase 4: Final delivery report with all 20 required items
